description:
SUMMER STARTS NOW | EXCLUSIVE DEAL BY BLACKLINE. With The Market Settling & Demand Returning, We're Moving Into Summer Early - Aligned Back To The Blackline Standard. Choose One Of The Following Exclusive Offers Redeemable On Any Of Our Stock Cars. 1. Complimentary PPF (Gloss or Satin) 2. Complimentary 1 Year Insurance Cover (T's & C's Apply) 3. AED 10,000 Auto Loan Down Payment Contribution For More Information Please Reach Out To One Of The Team Today 
 2023 Range Rover SV, 4.4TC V8, 4WD, 606bhp, 8 Speed Auto. AED 679,000 or AED 10,638 / Month with 20 % Down Payment over 5 Years. 
 - Mileage Only 41,196 KM's - Al Tayer Warranty Valid Until 15th April 2028 or 150,000 KM's - GCC specification - Price includes VAT 
 - Ligurian Black Satin - Panoramic Glass Roof - 360 Surround View Camera - Engine Auto Stop-Start Feature - Auto on/off Projector Beam LED (DRL) - Soft Close Doors - Electric Side-Steps - Meridian Signature Surround Sound System - Electric Memory Seats - Heated & Cooled Front Seats - Keyless Entry - Adaptive Cruise Control - Ambient Interior Lighting - Digital Instrument Cluster - Cooled Box Centre Console - Head-Up Display - Blind Spot Assist - Lane Keeping Assist - Emergency Braking - Park Assist - Apple Car Play - Electric Tailgate - Satellite Navigation
